messages.content: I'm building a RAG pipeline migrating from FAISS to Pinecone.
Got it — want help with the embedding step or the index migration itself?
Embeddings, I'm using Gemini embeddings and hit some SDK issues.
What error are you seeing exactly?
A dimension mismatch when upserting into the Pinecone index.
That usually means your index was created with a different dimension than your embedding model outputs.
